transcript:
[00:00:00.00] All right welcome back to the show dog is my co-pilot. What where are we going?
[00:00:04.20] Biker gym's hot gourmet hot dog. We're just getting a gourmet hot dog for a guy.
[00:00:08.28] Sorry I'm assuming. Yeah who's getting it?
[00:00:12.92] Rough doesn't say it's a nice day. We're gonna put a couple of hot dogs right here.
[00:00:22.36] All the snow is melting over there. All the snow melted. It was a snow day yesterday.
[00:00:27.44] We delivered some red lobster to a guy named Ryan Rucker. He needed three sodas.
[00:00:33.62] Like fucking three salads. Croutons on the side. The largest steak they had at Red
[00:00:39.36] Lobster which is true. It was in the notes. He said, T.Y. Thank you. Also he needed his
[00:00:44.60] croutons on the side. That's the way the crouton crumbles. We're gonna go to a
[00:00:52.16] bullshit gourmet hot dog restaurant right now. Themed on bikers.
